overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in a flowing coat exploring a desolate, rocky landscape at night. The character walks through open wasteland terrain, pauses at a cliff overlook to survey the misty surroundings, then continues along a narrow mountain path flanked by rock walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky wasteland with scattered ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the broken rocky terrain toward a distant overlook point

entered.detail: tall crumbling stone structure silhouetted against the night sky
uneven ground with cracks and scattered stone debris
low bushes and dry grass scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open rocky wasteland under a cloudy night sky. The terrain is uneven with broken ground and scattered vegetation, while a distant ruined tower looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: character stops walking at the cliff edge to observe the landscape

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook, slowly turning to survey the misty valley and distant ruins below

entered.detail: fog-filled valley below the cliff with faint outlines of distant structures

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at a cliff edge, revealing a sweeping view of a misty valley below. The camera pans as the character surveys the landscape, with distant ruins now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain path between steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dirt path with a tall stone cliff wall on the right and grassy slopes on the left

entered.detail: steep rock face with layered stone formations rising beside the path
grass-covered hillside rising to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a narrow mountain path flanked by a tall stone cliff on the right and grassy slopes on the left. The terrain becomes more enclosed as the path winds through the rock formations, with the distant tower still visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate rocky wasteland that transitions from a wide-open expanse into a narrow, enclosed mountain pass. It begins with the character traversing uneven ground and scattered vegetation under a cloudy night sky, moving steadily toward a distant ruined tower. As the character reaches a cliff edge, the perspective expands into a sweeping pan over a misty valley, revealing further ruins scattered across the landscape below. The scene then shifts as the character moves away from the overlook and onto a winding mountain path, where the open horizon is replaced by a tall stone cliff on the right and grassy slopes on the left. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly constricted as the path cuts through the rock formations while the distant tower remains a focal point ahead.
